title: Author datasheet (Gebru-style) for each pilot dataset
context: M1 pilot documentation. A Gebru-style datasheet per pilot dataset for transparency and reuse. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Author a Gebru-style datasheet for each pilot dataset, conforming to the Datasheet schema.
acceptanceCriteria: A datasheet exists per pilot dataset and validates against the Datasheet schema.
Covers motivation, composition, collection, preprocessing, uses, distribution, and licensing.
Cites the SourceRecord and provenance for each dataset.
resources: Gebru et al., Datasheets for Datasets
